calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-06-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Trish Abalos.
Petitioner: Dianalyn Dalisay, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the three Minor: Sharlyn Perdigon, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name of the Minors were made at the hearing.
In open court, Application to Dispens with Notice is granted.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Sharlyn Dalisay.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-23-2007 Reset To Nov-06-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: K. Farnsworth.
Petitioner: Dianalyn Dalisay, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Sharlyn Perdigon, was sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent or proof of service on notice, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to Nov. 6, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to submit proof of service to the Minor's father of the new hearing date or to file an Application with declaration for an Order dispensing with notice.
The Court waived re-publication requirement.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
